htmlContent:
# Catalyst (Trip Journal) - Structural Blueprint

## Overview
A modern trip journaling application featuring AI assistance, offline-ready PWA capabilities, and secure authentication via WebAuthn/Passkeys.

## 1. Information Architecture & Primary Navigation
The app uses a collapsible sidebar as its primary navigation anchor (4.5rem to 16rem).

- **Home / Dashboard**: Overview of current trips, quick actions, and AI interactions.
- **Trips (CRUD)**: The central hub for managing journey data.
- **Journal Entries**: A global or trip-specific view of story content.
- **Users (Admin)**: Management interface for user accounts and permissions.
- **Account / Profile**: Personal settings and security management.

---

## 2. Core User Flows

### A. Authentication & Onboarding (Rodauth + WebAuthn)
- **Landing (Public)** -> Create Account -> Email Verification -> Dashboard.
- **Login (Standard)** -> Password Input -> Dashboard.
- **Login (Biometric)** -> Passkey/WebAuthn -> Dashboard.
- **Invitation Flow** -> Invitation Link -> Pre-filled Signup -> Verified Access.

### B. Trip & Journaling Lifecycle
1. **Trips Index** -> New Trip -> **Trip Show** (The "Hub").
2. **From Trip Show**:
   - Manage Details (Edit/Delete).
   - **Journaling**: New Entry -> Show Entry -> Add Images/Comments/Reactions.
   - **Planning**: New Checklist -> Manage Items (Toggle/Add/Delete).
   - **Collaboration**: Invite Users -> Manage Permissions.

### C. Admin & Account Management
- **User Directory**: View all users -> Edit/Delete/Manage Roles.
- **Account Settings**: Update Profile -> Security (Passkeys/Password) -> Export Data.

---

## 3. Data Schema & Relationships

- **User**: The root entity. Has many Trips and Exports.
- **Trip**: BELONGS TO User. HAS MANY Journal Entries and Checklists.
- **Journal Entry**: BELONGS TO Trip. HAS MANY Images, Comments, and Reactions.
- **Checklist**: BELONGS TO Trip. HAS MANY Checklist Items.
- **Comment/Reaction**: BELONGS TO Journal Entry and User.
- **Export**: BELONGS TO User (EPUB/ZIP formats).

---

## 4. Shared UI & Interaction Patterns
- **Flash Toasts**: Real-time feedback for all CRUD operations.
- **Dark Mode**: System-aware with manual override (class-based).
- **Collapsible Sidebar**: Adaptive layout (fixed overlay on mobile).
- **PWA Install**: Persistent banner for app installation.
- **Turbo/Stimulus**: seamless, SPA-like transitions without full page reloads.

---

## 5. AI Integration (Jack)
- **Actor**: `jack@system.local`.
- **Capability**: Full read/write access to domain entities via 12 specialized MCP tools.
- **Interface**: Integrated into Dashboard and Entry views for contextual assistance.
